search_queries_used: site:bsaci.org allergic non-allergic rhinitis guideline history examination follow-up 2017
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic antihistamine, steroid, immunotherapy, testing, or referral
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Subtype and control require clinician interpretation and, where appropriate, testing.
No medicine, procedure, test, referral, or treatment recommendation is generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Children or adults with clinician-established chronic rhinitis; pregnancy, occupational rhinitis, structural obstruction, systemic disease, and severe asthma need additional pathways.
setting_applicability: Primary, allergy, respiratory, paediatric, or ENT outpatient follow-up.
UAE_applicability: BSACI guidance requires UAE allergy-testing, environmental, occupational, prescribing, immunotherapy, and referral adaptation.
recency_verification: The official BSACI 2017 revised guideline exact history, examination, and investigation sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: The 2017 revised edition remains listed by BSACI; material recency uncertainty remains.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact rhinitis history section supports interval change, symptom impact, nasal and extra-nasal features, triggers, relevant negatives, concerns, and medicine or social context without determining allergic or non-allergic subtype.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting onset, duration, triggers, rhinorrhoea, obstruction, sneezing, itching, crusting, eye and lower-airway symptoms, sleep, snoring, mouth breathing, family, social, occupational, and medicine context without assigning rhinitis subtype.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact examination section supports clinician-performed general, nasal, throat, airflow, septal, secretion, crusting, and polyp documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-performed general inspection, mouth-breathing observation, airflow assessment, anterior rhinoscopy, secretions, septal appearance, polyps, crusting, throat, and postnasal-drip documentation.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact investigation context supports review of existing specialist or imaging information and a clinician-entered follow-up plan without recommending testing or treatment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports recording clinician-selected allergy testing and already available specialist or imaging results; routine radiology and autonomous testing are not mapped.

unresolved_source_gaps: Subtype, symptom pattern, triggers, sleep and work impact, asthma, medicines, adherence, examination, testing, diagnosis, treatment response, plan, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
